mapper.sql: id, receiver_user_id, student_name, counselor_name, type, title, content, read_flag, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (receiver_user_id, student_name, counselor_name, type, title, content, read_flag) VALUES (#{receiverUserId}, #{studentName}, #{counselorName}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{readFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND read_flag = 0
UPDATE notification SET read_flag = 1 WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND read_flag = 0
